mapper.sql: Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Complaint_Content, Complaint_Source, Complaint_Date, Handle_Status, Handle_User_Id, Handle_Result, Handle_Date, Create_Date
mapper.insert:
insert into complaint (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Complaint_Content, Complaint_Source, Complaint_Date, Handle_Status, Handle_User_Id, Handle_Result, Handle_Date, Create_Date) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS Id

insert into complaint (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Complaint_Content, Complaint_Source, Complaint_Date, Handle_Status, Handle_User_Id, Handle_Result, Handle_Date, Create_Date) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

Complaint_Content,
Complaint_Source,

mapper.update:
update complaint
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Product_No = #{record.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Sub_Code = #{record.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Phone_No = #{record.phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Content = #{record.complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Source = #{record.complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Date = #{record.complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Handle_Status = #{record.handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Handle_User_Id = #{record.handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Handle_Result = #{record.handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Handle_Date = #{record.handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update complaint set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Product_No = #{record.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Sub_Code = #{record.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Phone_No = #{record.phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Content = #{record.complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Source = #{record.complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Date = #{record.complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Handle_Status = #{record.handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Handle_User_Id = #{record.handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Handle_Result = #{record.handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Handle_Date = #{record.handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update complaint
Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Product_No = #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Sub_Code = #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Phone_No = #{phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Content = #{complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Source = #{complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Complaint_Date = #{complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Handle_Status = #{handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Handle_User_Id = #{handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Handle_Result = #{handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Handle_Date = #{handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update complaint set Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Product_No = #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Sub_Code = #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Phone_No = #{phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Content = #{complaint_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Source = #{complaint_Source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Complaint_Date = #{complaint_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Handle_Status = #{handle_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Handle_User_Id = #{handle_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Handle_Result = #{handle_Result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Handle_Date = #{handle_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
